UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f)(4) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-25-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2023 Continued To Apr-26-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
